rulings.Case Title: PAMELA M SNYDER VS. HI TECH TERMITE CONTROL OF THE BAY AREA, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 17, 2009, line 28, DEFENDANTS HI TECH TERMITE CONTROL OF THE BAY AREA, INC., MICHAEL COMBS DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend to plead facts showing how defendant and or the pest report violated regulation 1999.5 which is an "advertising" regulation. Sustained with ten days leave to amend to cite positive assertions to support negligent misrepresentation cause of action and to attach pest report. Demurrer overruled for uncertainty. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID YANG et al VS. FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 17, 2009, line 18, DEFENDANTS FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC, CRESCENT HEIGHTS INC, HOWARD S. WRIGHT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, DEMURRER. Demurrer sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to first cause of action for breach of CC&Rs for plaintiffs to allege all the material terms of the agreement. Demurrer overruled as to second cause of action for nuisance. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend to plead facts showing all defendants are liabile to plaintiff for damages. Plaintiff must plead facts supporting allegation that defendants' conduct was intentional and willful to suppport punitive damages claim. =(302/CWW)
